subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! This blessed morn is the festival day and the birth of the All-Merciful Lord. Everyone is engaged in remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی میثاق بامداد عید مبارک است و روز مولود حضرت رحمانیت هرکس بذکری و
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
